Name: LASALLE College of the Arts
Tagline: Study arts, design and performance at LASALLE College of the Arts—guided by global faculty and connected to real-world industry and creative networks.
About: LASALLE College of the Arts is a globally ranked institution for Art & Design and Performing Arts education (QS World University Rankings by Subject 2026)—anchored in Singapore, rooted in Asia and connected to the world. Discover an arts education designed for today’s ever-changing world.
Philosophy: The Early Admission Exercise (EAE) is an aptitude-based admissions exercise open to graduating O-Level students, final-year Nitec and Higher Nitec students from the Institute of Technical Education and graduating Integrated Programme (IP)/International Baccalaureate (IB) Year 4 students. This exercise allows students to apply for and receive conditional offers for admission to LASALLE prior to receiving their final grades.
Outcomes: Dr Venka Purushothaman on his journey to becoming president of LASALLE College of the Arts. It was while working on secondment as the Director of Marketing for the Singapore Arts Festival that Dr Venka Purushothaman, recently appointed President of LASALLE College of the Arts, says his interest was piqued in doctorate studies.
Admissions: Upon receipt of your completed documents, the Division of Admissions will schedule an audition or interview, if required.
Quote: Workshops/auditions will be conducted between 3–8 June 2026.

Performance.Coaching Credentials: The LASALLE College of the Arts collection documents the College’s curatorial legacy and evolving engagement with contemporary art. Spanning student works, faculty projects and major donations, the collection reflects LASALLE’s role in shaping the region’s artistic discourse.
Performance.Academic Integration: Situated within the McNally Campus, its five galleries present a curation of local and international exhibitions, as well as collaborations with students, staff and alumni. ICAS is where bold ideas, critical conversations and contemporary arts come together.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: INTERLUDE marks a moment of active transition. It brings together in-progress works in which MA Design students examine technology, systems and social change as lived, contested realities.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Singapore-born Dr Purushothaman jokes that he’s an “accidental academic”. Accidental or not, he began his studies purposefully, undertaking a Bachelor of English Literature and Communication Studies at York University in Toronto, Canada.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: Among the council’s responsibilities was the conception of what would become the Esplanade – Theatres on the Bay, a durian-shaped arts centre and landmark that forms part of the Marina Bay skyline. When its design was unveiled in 1994, The Straits Times called it “a landmark for the year 2000”.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: LASALLE College of the Arts offers a comprehensive student support system, including professional counselling services and dedicated pastoral care, to ensure students' mental and emotional wellbeing. Regular workshops and community events foster a supportive and inclusive campus environment.
